# Clive Developer API Marketplace
> South African developer API marketplace offering production-ready REST APIs

Clive is built by Donington Vale, based in Centurion, Gauteng, South Africa.
Contact: support@clive.dev
Documentation: https://clive.dev/docs

## APIs

- HackKit: Penetration testing and domain recon API. Ten capabilities, one credential. https://clive.dev/products/hackkit
- ShieldKit: Unified cybersecurity API — IP, domain, URL, payload, email, batch. https://clive.dev/products/shieldkit
- SearchCore: Full-text, semantic, and hybrid search in one deployable API. https://clive.dev/products/searchcore
- EmbedCore: General-purpose text embeddings. OpenAI-compatible. https://clive.dev/products/embedcore
- TenderIQ: South African government tender intelligence from CC BY 4.0 licensed procurement data. https://clive.dev/products/tenderiq
- ContractIQ: Contract analysis and risk scoring API. https://clive.dev/products/contractiq
- MeetingIQ: Meeting transcription and intelligence API. https://clive.dev/products/meetingiq
- FXBridge: Real-time and historical FX rates API. https://clive.dev/products/fxbridge
- WealthMind: Personal finance intelligence API. https://clive.dev/products/wealthmind
- CreditLens: Alternative credit risk scoring API. https://clive.dev/products/creditlens
- TalentPulse: Job market intelligence and salary benchmarks. https://clive.dev/products/talentpulse
- DevKit: Developer utility API — UUID, hash, cron, and more. https://clive.dev/products/devkit
- OracleIQ: Prediction market intelligence API. https://clive.dev/products/oracleiq
- TransactIQ: Transaction enrichment and categorisation API. https://clive.dev/products/transactiq
- TrustIQ: Identity and trust verification API. https://clive.dev/products/trustiqq
- FinSightIQ: Financial data intelligence API. https://clive.dev/products/finsightiq

## Chrome Extensions

- VoicePost: AI LinkedIn writing assistant. https://clive.dev/products/voicepost
- PayGrade: Salary intelligence overlay on job listings. https://clive.dev/products/paygrade
- ReviewPal: GitHub PR visual design reviewer. https://clive.dev/products/reviewpal
- BriefPal: Meeting intelligence for Google Calendar and Meet. https://clive.dev/products/briefpal
- DesignSpy: Design token extractor from any live website. https://clive.dev/products/designspy
- CopyPilot: AI writing assistant for every text field. https://clive.dev/products/copypilot
- HandoffReady: Live webpage design QA auditor. https://clive.dev/products/handoffready
- FlowMapper: Website sitemap and user flow visualiser. https://clive.dev/products/flowmapper

## Domains

Clive offers domain registration for .com, .co.za, .net, .org, .io, .dev, and more.
Real-time availability check against global domain registry.
https://clive.dev/domains

## For Providers

Developers can list their own APIs on the Clive marketplace via the Provider Console.
Clive takes a 12% platform fee — providers keep 88% of every transaction.
24-hour review process. Free to list.
https://clive.dev/sell

## Pricing

Every API on Clive includes a permanent free tier. No credit card required.
Paid plans available monthly, billed in ZAR.
https://clive.dev/products
